title: Pan-Seared Gyoza with Sour Cream Dipping Sauce
description: A simple and flavorful Japanese-inspired appetizer featuring pan-seared gyoza served with a tangy sour cream dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the gyoza to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
3. Remove the gyoza from the skillet and place on a paper towel-lined plate.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the sour cream, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and grated ginger.
5. Stir in the sliced green onions.
6. Serve the pan-seared gyoza with the sour cream dipping sauce.
7. Garnish with additional green onions if desired.
